title: Clubtimizer
body:
# Clubtimizer **[Unofficial] Utility mod for mcpvp.club** _(Note that requeue'ing has been changed to be a crouch-left-click with the sword)_ ----- ### Features:
Configurable
AutoGG Automatically sends a configurable GG message - Can trigger on round end or full match end - Reaction mode waits for opponent GG first - Customizable trigger words ``` /h-club autogg : no parameters | toggles AutoGG on/off on/off | explicitly sets AutoGG state setMsg | sets your GG message reaction | toggles reaction mode reaction on/off | sets reaction mode round | toggles round mode round on/off | sets round mode add | adds a trigger word remove | removes a trigger word ```
AutoCope Sends a random customizable message when you die ``` /h-club autocope : no parameters | toggles AutoCope on/off on/off | explicitly sets AutoCope state add | adds a cope phrase remove | removes a cope phrase ```
AutoResponse Automatically responds to certain chat messages using rules. - Rule-based system (inputs -> outputs) - Multiple triggers and responses - Randomized output ``` /h-club autoresponse : no parameters | toggles AutoResponse on/off on/off | explicitly sets AutoResponse state rule new | creates new rule rule show | shows rule rule delete | deletes rule rule edit add input | adds input triggers, separated by |'s rule edit add output | adds outputs, separated by |'s rule edit remove input | removes input rule edit remove output | removes output ```
AutoHush Replaces player messages with dashes - Keeps your own and friends’ messages visible - Original message visible on hover - Sends customizable message at match start - Forces spectator chat to be dashes if not hidden thorugh specChat ``` /h-club autohush : no parameters | toggles AutoHush on/off on/off | explicitly sets AutoHush state setMsg | sets match join message ```
SpecChat Controls spectator chat visibility Modes: - visible (Completely Visible) - compressed (Turns into dashes, like autoHush) - hidden (Completely Hidden) ``` /h-club specchat : no parameters | cycles mode visible | sets spectator chat visible compressed | sets spectator chat compressed hidden | sets spectator chat hidden ```
Requeue Instantly queues selected gamemodes - Shift + left-click with queue sword to activate - Customizable gamemode order - Leaves queue if already queued - Disabled in Sumo region ``` /h-club requeue : no parameters | tells you how to use it | sets queue order (example: 8136) ```
Lobby A bunch of separate lobby options - Hiding players doesn't hide NPC's and friends - Hiding players doesn't hide them in the sumo area - Hiding chat doesn't hide friend chats - Hiding parties _**DOES**_ hide public parties that are hosted by friends ``` /h-club lobby : no parameters | shows lobby settings hidePlayers | toggles hiding players hidePlayers on/off | sets hiding players hideChat | toggles hiding random player chat hideChat on/off | sets hiding random player chat hidePublicParties | toggles hiding public party invites hidePublicParties on/off | sets hiding public party invites hitbox | toggles hitboxes on connect hitbox on/off | sets hitboxes on connect warning | toggles MCPVP warnings warning on/off | sets MCPVP warnings ```
Automatic
PartyMaker Automatically creates a party if you invite someone without one
Rematch Creates a clickable rematch message after duels. - Clickable text suggests /duel in your chat window - Has a hover preview
Totem Resetter Resets totem counter on round end
Ping Fixing Cleans up tablist and Better Ping Display latency. - Parses real ping from tablist - Removes duplicate “ms” text with BetterPingDisplay mod, if you have it, otherwise just removes the ping icon - Always removes ping icon if its 1000, -1, or 1
QOL
GUI Fixes Prevents clicking empty background GUI items
Lobby Fixes Prioritizes using wind charges in off-hand in lobby when looking at right-clickable blocks (by sending a shift-right-click packet to the server)
Misc
Direct Config Editing ``` /h-club config open | opens config file /h-club config save | saves config /h-club | shows debug info (state + version) ```
